posts.author: andrewginn (Andrew Ginn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to see the timeline column be able to pull durations from formula columns as well as number columns.

What are you trying to achieve

I have created a formula that calculates how many engineering days I need for a project based on the project’s contracted value. I’d like to use that formula column as a duration for my ‘Engineering Timeline’ so that when I set an end date to the timeline, the software automatically makes the timeline respect the duration.
